org.apache.paimon.table.source

Class InnerStreamTableScanImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.table.source.AbstractInnerTableScan
      • org.apache.paimon.table.source.InnerStreamTableScanImpl
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    InnerStreamTableScan, InnerTableScan, StreamTableScan, TableScan, Restorable<Long>

    public class InnerStreamTableScanImpl
extends AbstractInnerTableScan
implements InnerStreamTableScan
    StreamTableScan implementation for streaming planning.
